report_name: Samsung's April 2026 Patch Fixes 47 Vulnerabilities in Galaxy Devices

vulnerabilities.name: Google Android April 2026 Security Bulletin Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: A set of 33 vulnerabilities from Google's April 2026 Android Security Bulletin, including 14 critical, 18 high, and 1 moderate severity flaws, affecting Samsung Galaxy devices. These patches address core components of the Android operating system, including the framework, system, and kernel.

vulnerabilities.name: Samsung Vulnerabilities and Exposures (SVE) - April 2026
vulnerabilities.description: A set of 14 Samsung-specific vulnerabilities (SVEs) addressing high-severity flaws in Samsung's mobile software (e.g., One UI, Knox, Bixby) and semiconductor firmware stack, fixed in the April 2026 patch.
